The patient has a history of diabetes mellitus. There is no acute or chronic infection requiring treatment, HIV, hepatitis B, hepatitis C, syphilis, tuberculosis risk, or bleeding risk.
No active interstitial lung disease, active autoimmune disease, uncontrolled cardiac disease, active uncontrolled infection, or organ transplant history is present.
